description: Won the 2016 Spanish Grand Prix at 18 years and 228 days old

recordName: Youngest driver to score a podium in F1
description: Finished 3rd at the 2015 Malaysian Grand Prix at 17 years and 180 days old

recordName: Youngest driver to score points in F1
description: Finished 7th at the 2015 Malaysian Grand Prix at 17 years and 180 days old

recordName: Most wins in a single F1 season
description: Won 19 races in the 2023 season, breaking the previous record of 13 wins

recordName: Most podium finishes in a single F1 season
description: Achieved 21 podium finishes in the 2023 season

recordName: Most consecutive race wins in F1
description: Won 10 consecutive races from the 2023 Miami Grand Prix to the 2023 Italian Grand Prix
Set a lap time of 5:19.546 in a Red Bull RB7 during a demonstration run in 2011 (as a test driver)

recordName: Most wins at the Dutch Grand Prix
description: Has won his home Grand Prix 4 times consecutively from 2021 to 2024

recordName: Most pole positions in a single F1 season
description: Achieved 10 pole positions in both the 2021 and 2023 seasons

recordName: Youngest World Drivers' Champion in F1
description: Won his first World Championship in 2021 at 24 years and 73 days old

recordName: Most points scored in a single F1 season
description: Scored 575 points in the 2023 season, breaking his own previous record of 454 points in 2022
Extended his career win tally to 71 victories across the 2024 and 2025 seasons, the most of any active driver
Reached 133 career podium finishes by the end of the 2025 season, the highest tally among active Formula 1 drivers
